title: Comment on HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: I support efforts to reduce unnecessary administrative burden and improve real-world interoperability. Please ensure any deregulatory actions do not weaken patient privacy and transparency, and that outcomes remain measurable (e.g., consistent, usable access to health data in practice—not just “paper interoperability”). I also encourage attention to implementation impacts on small clinics and safety-net providers so changes don’t widen inequities. Thank you for considering these points.
